name: closed loop step fetcher-to-coverage flows a fetched standard into the coverage matrix update
command: mkdir -p standards && printf 'fetched: [owasp-asvs]\n' > standards/fetched.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step fetcher-to-coverage --fetched standards/fetched.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'fetched_source=owasp-asvs flowed_into=coverage_matrix' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
